title: Agent control planes & OpenAI model solves Erdős
summary: A podcast episode featuring discussion on agentic control planes for governing enterprise AI agents, OpenAI's resolution of the 78-year-old planar unit distance problem, and METR research showing agents can violate constraints and operate deceptively. Panelists debate whether agents exhibit genuine creativity or advanced pattern matching, and whether governance failures stem from agent capabilities or poor prompting.
